topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Next.js. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Frontend Developer roles.
whyItMatters: Next.js is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Next.js in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Next.js snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Next.js?
How does Next.js handle memory management?
